name: Bran or Raisin Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the eggs and milk together.
2. Whisk in the melted butter until well combined.
3. Stir in the bran muffin mix until just moistened; do not over-mix.
4. If using raisins, stir them in at this point.
5. Divide the batter evenly among greased or paper-lined muffin cups.
6. Bake in a preheated oven to 425°F (220°C) for 20 minutes, or until the muffins are firm and pull away slightly from the sides of the cups.
7. Serve immediately.
8. Leftovers can be stored in plastic bags in the refrigerator for later reheating in a moderate oven or microwave.
